---
title: "My Website"
---

::: columns
::: {.column width="50%" style="text-align: center;"}
### Ivanna de Anda
```{r, echo=FALSE, fig.align='left', out.width='60%'}
knitr::include_graphics("images/headshot.jpg")
```


:::

::: {.column width="50%" style="text-align: left;"}

I am making a website :) Here is my dashboard:https://ivannadeanda.shinyapps.io/ile_dashboard/ 


:::
